adminSettings__documentId__company.companyStandards: Stop work for imminent danger. PPE per site orientation. Report near-misses to the super.
adminSettings__documentId__company.responseStyle: Short SMS. Plain English. Direct. A little site slang is OK when it saves words.
adminSettings__documentId__company.approvedTerminology: Use 'pour' for concrete placement in texts when it sounds natural.
adminSettings__documentId__company.reportingPreferences: Encourage logging issues and deliveries with log issue: / log delivery: when they affect schedule.
adminSettings__documentId__company.escalationRules: Life safety: call 911 and site safety. Quality hold: notify PM same day.

projects__documentId__docksteader.name: Docksteader (sample)
projects__documentId__docksteader.instructionText: Sample project — replace with real GC rules, spec references, and job-specific notes before production.
projects__documentId__docksteader.contactsText: Super: add name/phone. Safety: site trailer. PM: add contact.
projects__documentId__docksteader.scheduleNotes: 3-week lookahead: add key milestones (pours, inspections, critical deliveries).
projects__documentId__docksteader.faqText: Laydown area: TBD. Gate hours: TBD.
projects__documentId__docksteader.notes: Edit anytime in Console or re-run npm run seed.
